[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 11101101 6
2 01111110 6
3 00011101 4
4 00010111 4
5 11101101 6
6 11000010 3
7 11110111 7

67 76 11111111 a
70 07 11101111 7

13 31 11111111 a
